---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Paperless Assistant
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's currently painful or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches how documents are written, note how it
preserves the safety invariants (dry-run-first, snapshot-before-write, spend caps,
human-review gates, taxonomy-reuse-first — see CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Deployment mode, provider, or any other relevant details.
